summary: A 5‑star show praised for Jerry’s smoking guitar work; recording source and quality are not specified.
review: The lone review is overwhelmingly positive, calling the concert “great” and highlighting Jerry Garcia’s playing as “smoking.” No details about the recording method or sound quality were provided, so the technical assessment remains unknown.
